channel.title: Perry Hu | Personal Brand Entity
channel.description: Recent content on Perry Hu | Personal Brand Entity

item.title: About Perry Hu
item.description:
Professional Profile

I am a Data Team Lead with a deep passion for data architecture and pipeline optimization. My work focuses on transforming complex data streams into actionable assets.

Core Expertise

  • Data Engineering: Design and implementation of scalable data lakes and warehouses.
  • ETL Workflows: Expert in Apache Airflow and complex DAG orchestration.
  • Languages: Advanced Python and SQL Server optimization.

Contact & Collaboration

I am always open to discussing data strategy or technical challenges.
